description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure with distinctly stylized features reminiscent of ancient Egyptian art. The figure has long, intricately detailed hair or headdress that falls over the shoulders and down the back. The arms are held straight at the sides, and the body posture is upright and formal, with subtle anatomical detailing visible in the chest and limbs. The facial features are symmetrical, with almond-shaped eyes and a calm expression. The surface appears to be made of dark stone, with a weathered, slightly rough texture. The overall form is elongated and slender, with a flat back and a solid, monolithic appearance.
description: A dark stone sculpture of a standing human figure with long, detailed hair and formal posture, reminiscent of ancient Egyptian art. The surface is weathered and slightly rough, with subtle anatomical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed facial features, long hair or headdress, and upright posture with arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight arm, and the elongated form of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and hair or headdress, as well as the flatness of the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and arm, mirroring the left side.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
